title: Overnight Operator - allowed external repos for the runtime sandbox
policy: Only repos listed here may be touched by ghoti_repo_execution_sandbox.py. A repo with no confident source_url is marked source_url_required and is never guessed. Clones go only under 21_repos/third_party_runtime_sandbox/ and are never committed. Runtime execution (install/help/tests) stays disabled unless its static scan passes AND the matching feature flag is enabled.

repos.name: ECC
repos.source_evidence: User-prioritized external source for agentic coding setup extraction.
repos.notes: Clone/static-inspect first. Inspect agents, skills, rules, commands, hooks, MCP/client surfaces, and security scanning patterns. No install or runtime execution.

repos.name: GBrain
repos.source_evidence: User-prioritized external source for personal brain and agent memory architecture.
repos.notes: Clone/static-inspect for brain repo format, memory layout, Telegram/MCP/server path, and skills model. No setup or live bot.

repos.name: Documenso
repos.notes: Classify as signing, approval, contracts, and workflow. No hosting, deploy, account setup, or email sending.

repos.name: Overleaf
repos.notes: Classify as collaborative LaTeX/project/report writing. No hosting, deploy, or account setup.

repos.name: MarkItDown
repos.source_evidence: Official Microsoft open-source repository; URL resolved and HEAD reachable during N+6.19A.
repos.notes: Preferred first real execution target. This milestone clones it, reads LICENSE/README/pyproject, runs read-only git metadata, and static-scans the code. venv + editable install + --help stay deferred behind markitdown_sandbox_enabled (monorepo: package lives under packages/markitdown).

repos.name: Ruflo
repos.clone_blocked_reason: Documented obfuscated malicious npm preinstall history and MCP prompt-injection issues; pattern is re-expressed from scratch (no code copied), never installed or executed.
repos.notes: Static-scan/report only. The N+6.12A static clone lives in the primary worktree (git-ignored), so it is reported not-present in this runtime worktree.

repos.name: TryCUA / CUA Driver
repos.notes: Static-scan/report only. Computer-use stays disabled behind the global kill switch. No Docker/QEMU runtime, no desktop control.

repos.name: Browser Harness
repos.notes: Static-scan/report only. Self-writing-code behavior must never be enabled inside Ghoti. No CDP connection, no live browser.

repos.name: Vercel agent-browser
repos.notes: Static-scan/report only. Apache-2.0 requires preserving NOTICE/attribution if any code is reused. No global npm install, no Chrome download, no run.

repos.name: Understand-Anything
repos.notes: Exact official source URL is not recorded in the repo and is ambiguous. Per the do-not-guess rule, the operator must supply the exact URL before any clone or scan.

repos.name: Graphify
repos.notes: 'Graphify' maps to several unrelated projects. The exact official source URL must be supplied before any action; it is never guessed.

repos.name: Odysseus
repos.notes: URL provided by the operator. Owner is unfamiliar, so it is recorded but NOT cloned this milestone; a reachability + static scan must pass before any runtime use. No runtime execution yet under any circumstances this milestone.

repos.name: UI-TARS
repos.notes: Multiple distinct upstream repos (model vs desktop app). Kept source-needed; never guessed. Aligns with the N+5.0A observation-only adapter.

repos.name: browser-use
repos.notes: Deferred/blocked priority: the cloud product emphasizes stealth/proxy/CAPTCHA-solving, which conflicts with Ghoti's no-bypass policy. Not cloned or scanned this milestone.
